heading: Notice of large gifts received from foreign persons
label: 6039F Notice of large gifts received from foreign persons
notes: Inflation Adjusted Items for Certain YearsFor inflation adjustment of certain items in this section, see Revenue Procedures listed in a table under .section 1 of this title
CodificationAnother section 6039F was renumbered .section 6039G of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: If the value of the aggregate foreign gifts received by a United States person (other than an organization described in section 501(c) and exempt from tax under section 501(a)) during any taxable year exceeds $10,000, such United States person shall furnish (at such time and in such manner as the Secretary shall prescribe) such information as the Secretary may prescribe regarding each foreign gift received during such year.

children.heading: Foreign gift
children.label: b Foreign gift
children.text: For purposes of this section, the term “foreign gift” means any amount received from a person other than a United States person which the recipient treats as a gift or bequest. Such term shall not include any qualified transfer (within the meaning of section 2503(e)(2)) or any distribution properly disclosed in a return under section 6048(c).

children.heading: Penalty for failure to file information
children.label: c Penalty for failure to file information
A
children.text: the tax consequences of the receipt of such gift shall be determined by the Secretary, and

children.label: B
children.text: such United States person shall pay (upon notice and demand by the Secretary and in the same manner as tax) an amount equal to 5 percent of the amount of such foreign gift for each month for which the failure continues (not to exceed 25 percent of such amount in the aggregate).

children.heading: Reasonable cause exception
children.label: 2 Reasonable cause exception
children.text: Paragraph (1) shall not apply to any failure to report a foreign gift if the United States person shows that the failure is due to reasonable cause and not due to willful neglect.

children.heading: Cost-of-living adjustment
children.label: d Cost-of-living adjustment
children.text: In the case of any taxable year beginning after , the $10,000 amount under subsection (a) shall be increased by an amount equal to the product of such amount and the cost-of-living adjustment for such taxable year under section 1(f)(3), except that subparagraph (A)(ii) thereof shall be applied by substituting “1995” for “2016”.December 31, 1996

children.heading: Regulations
children.label: e Regulations
children.text: The Secretary shall prescribe such regulations as may be necessary or appropriate to carry out the purposes of this section.
